steps.title: Convert mass from kilograms to grams
steps.content:
The conversion is straightforward. We multiply the dog's mass in kilograms by the number of grams per kilogram.
Since 1 kilogram = 1,000 grams, we have:
$$36 \text{ kg} \cdot 1,000 \frac{\text{grams}}{\text{kilograms}}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
